MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):

ARGUED. The Court admonishes Mr. Rayner re: special appearance. Mr. McDermott presents arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS (USA), INC. (ERRONEOUSLY NAMED AS DHL EXPRESS (USA)) DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Defendant's demurrer to the First Amended Complaint.

Taken Under Submission.

A proposed order is sent via email prior to hearing.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS (USA), INC.'s (ERRONEOUSLY NAMED AS DHL EXPRESS (USA)) DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DHL's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with leave to amend as to all three causes of action. No opposition filed. Plaintiff Abraham Kalichman is granted leave to file a first amended complaint no later than February 13, 2025.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
